title: Excalibur | Vanilla/Copper Age Backport Support
description: Compatibility backport supporting Pale Garden, Chase the Skies, Spring to Life and Copper Age content
body:
![Mod's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2abaac75e275bb016c94f577ca7886dbc255ca3.png)

This **unofficial** compatibility backport pack ensures that the textures in the [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**
- Redesigned all items, blocks and entities.

For the best experience, use this pack alongside Excalibur.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
- BlackGear – Creator of _Vanilla Backport_
- GrandPappyJay – For lending a hand with model work

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-vanilla-backport-support)
